title: Bachelorproject »Supernaturalis«
description: Supernaturalis examines the absurd side of our thinking that shapes us all. Through rituals, lucky charms, amulets from different cultures as well as unusual archival finds and anecdotes, this human irrationality is expressed both in terms of content and design. Accompanying the book of curiosities, the extensible archive on Instagram offers a constantly growing collection and staging of contemporary lucky charms, allowing readers to question their own magical thinking.
